title: п»їDunlap Daily 3_22_26
content:
Brett Whitely 1961

NEWS

USPS proposes raising first class stamps up to 95 cents.

US regulators are preparing to free up roughly $200 billion in bank capital.

Trump era immigration policy has produced a new billionaire family, Tommy Fisher, president of Fisher Sand & Gravel.

Eighth Circuit struck down the Biden era SAVE repayment plan.

Kudos launched AI powered bill negotiation and cancellation tools.

AI/TECH

Boston Dynamics quadruped robots are now patrolling major US data centers.

Humanoid robots could break the 10 second 100 meter sprint by mid 2026.

Lucid Motors unveiled вЂњLunarвЂќ, a two seat robotaxi.

A California civil jury found that Elon Musk intentionally misled Twitter shareholders in 2022 while attempting to exit his $44B acquisition of the company.

OpenAI plans to expand headcount from ~4,500 to ~8,000 employees by the end of 2026.

title: п»їDunlap Daily 3_20_26
content:
Weaver Hawkins, 1946

NEWS

Iranian ballistic missiles struck Ras Laffan Industrial City in Qatar, the worldГўв‚¬в„ўs largest LNG hub, causing extensive damage. The Ras Laffan strike followed an Israeli attack on South Pars, IranГўв‚¬в„ўs portion of the worldГўв‚¬в„ўs largest natural gas field. &Ras Laffan previously supplied ~20% of global LNG output; production was halted after the attack.

President Donald Trump stated Israel would not attack South Pars again but warned the U.S. would Гўв‚¬Е“blow up the entiretyГўв‚¬Вќ of IranГўв‚¬в„ўs gas field if Qatar were attacked again.

U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. is considering removing sanctions on Iranian oil already at sea. This could free roughly 140 million barrels of oil, equivalent to 10 days to two weeks of global supply.

Unidentified drones were detected over Fort Lesley J. McNair in Washington, where senior U.S. officials live. Several U.S. bases raised force protection levels amid heightened alert status.

Iran executed a Swedish citizen accused of spying for Israel. Sweden said the individual did not receive a fair trial and it summoned IranГўв‚¬в„ўs ambassador in protest.

Spain announced ГўвЂљВ¬1 billion in military aid to Ukraine for 2026.

Russia plans naval convoys and armed escorts for merchant ships amid rising maritime incidents.

HungaryГўв‚¬в„ўs Viktor OrbГѓВЎn blocked a ГўвЂљВ¬90 billion EU loan to Ukraine over a pipeline dispute.

An OSCE report accused GeorgiaГўв‚¬в„ўs ruling party of systemic human rights abuses, prompting a bipartisan U.S. Helsinki Commission statement.

WaymoГўв‚¬в„ўs self driving taxis surpassed 170 million miles driven, with 92% fewer serious incidents than human drivers.

Schizophrenia research identified a reduced form of brain protein Cacna2d1 as a potential diagnostic biomarker.

Finland ranked the worldГўв‚¬в„ўs happiest country for the ninth consecutive year. U.S. ranked 23rd, while Afghanistan ranked last. Report authors warned social media use is driving population level declines in well being, especially among adolescents.

Scientists confirmed that EarthГўв‚¬в„ўs gravity is not disappearing this year.

MARKETS

Regulators proposed reducing large bank capital requirements by ~5%, freeing capital for major banks.

U.S. national debt surpassed $39 trillion, raising long term fiscal constraints.

Uber committed up to $1.25B to Rivian robotaxis, planning 50,000 autonomous vehicles by 2031.

Blue Origin filed plans for 51,600 satellites to create orbital data centers.

AI/TECH/HEALTH SCIENCE

A federal judge said he will vacate a declaration by HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. asserting that gender affirming care for youth does not meet standards of care.

A little noticed amendment to the 2026 farm bill would make tobacco farmers eligible for federal aid. Critics argue it contradicts MAHA public health goals and effectively subsidizes a lethal product.

Research highlights a phenomenon called the Гўв‚¬Е“exoskeleton effectГўв‚¬Вќ. AI boosts short term productivity. But can weaken underlying human skills if over relied upon. The study found that workers who let AI complete entire tasks finished fastest but scored lowest on performance when tested independently.

Two recent studies underscore how difficult it is to properly study psychedelics, highlighting blinding problems in trials. Participants and researchers often know who received the drug due to its obvious psychoactive effects. The article argues that psychedelics may be overhyped because methodological weaknesses limit confidence in current results.

FBI Director Kash Patel confirmed to lawmakers that the agency has resumed purchasing AmericansГўв‚¬в„ў location data. The data is acquired from commercial data brokers.

A Meta AI agent accidentally exposed sensitive internal and user data. The exposure lasted roughly two hours. An engineer asked the agent for help. The agent posted information publicly on an internal forum without authorization. A separate recent incident involved a Meta directorГўв‚¬в„ўs OpenClaw agent which deleted her entire inbox despite instructions to confirm actions first.

LEGAL

The U.S. Department of Justice announced it will hire prosecutors directly from law school. Previously, most DOJ trial attorney roles required clerkships, prior litigation or prosecutorial experience. This is terrifying. The worst law schools turn out conservative ideologues.

Research highlights a phenomenon called the Гўв‚¬Е“exoskeleton effectГўв‚¬Вќ. AI boosts short term productivity. But can weaken underlying human skills if over relied upon. The study found that workers who let AI complete entire tasks finished fastest but scored lowest on performance when tested independently.

Two recent studies underscore how difficult it is to properly study psychedelics, highlighting blinding problems in trials. Participants and researchers often know who received the drug due to its obvious psychoactive effects. The article argues that psychedelics may be overhyped because methodological weaknesses limit confidence in current results.

FBI Director Kash Patel confirmed to lawmakers that the agency has resumed purchasing AmericansГўв‚¬в„ў location data. The data is acquired from commercial data brokers.

A Meta AI agent accidentally exposed sensitive internal and user data. The exposure lasted roughly two hours. An engineer asked the agent for help. The agent posted information publicly on an internal forum without authorization. A separate recent incident involved a Meta directorГўв‚¬в„ўs OpenClaw agent which deleted her entire inbox despite instructions to confirm actions first.

LEGAL

The U.S. Department of Justice announced it will hire prosecutors directly from law school. Previously, most DOJ trial attorney roles required clerkships, prior litigation or prosecutorial experience. This is terrifying. The worst law schools turn out conservative ideologues.

title: Dunlap Daily - March 19, 2026
content:
Welcome to today's edition of Dunlap Daily, your source for market insights and business updates.

Market Overview

--------------

Today marks another significant day in the financial markets with several key developments worth noting. The technology sector continues to show strong performance, while traditional sectors are adapting to new market conditions.

Key Highlights:

вЂў Market volatility remains within expected ranges

вЂў Technology investments showing promising returns

вЂў New regulatory developments affecting financial services

вЂў Consumer sentiment indicators trending positive

Business Focus

--------------

Our analysis today focuses on emerging trends in digital transformation and their impact on traditional business models. Companies that embrace technological innovation continue to outperform those that resist change.

Key Points:

вЂў Digital adoption accelerating across all sectors

вЂў Remote work models becoming permanent fixtures

вЂў Cloud infrastructure investments paying dividends

вЂў Cybersecurity concerns driving new investments

Looking Ahead

--------------

As we move forward, several factors will shape the business landscape:

1. Continued technological advancement

2. Regulatory environment evolution

3. Consumer behavior shifts

4. Global economic indicators

Conclusion

----------

Today's market presents both opportunities and challenges. Staying informed and adaptable remains crucial for success in this dynamic environment.

Thank you for reading Dunlap Daily. Stay tuned for tomorrow's insights.

---

Dunlap Daily Team

March 19, 2026

title: Daily Update - February 28, 2026
content:
HIGHLIGHTS

вЂў Completed newsletter automation system

The Dunlap Daily newsletter system is now fully operational! This automated system fetches content from OneDrive documents and generates beautiful RSS feeds and web pages.

ANNOUNCEMENTS
